description_long: This is a realistic white lily flower with large, slightly curved petals that exhibit subtle veining and a soft, matte texture. The flower features prominent stamens with brown anthers and a central pistil, adding detail and contrast to the otherwise pale bloom. Two unopened buds are visible, each elongated and encased in a protective sheath, suggesting the flower is part of a living plant. The stem is dark green and sturdy, supporting the flower and buds, while several lanceolate leaves emerge from the base and along the stem. The overall structure is elegant and natural, with the petals radiating outward in a whorled arrangement. This flower would be commonly found in urban parks, gardens, or as decorative landscaping along sidewalks.
description: A white lily flower with large, curved petals, two unopened buds, and lanceolate green leaves on a dark green stem. Prominent stamens and a central pistil add detail to the bloom.
description_view_0: The main open flower is prominent, with one bud and the central pistil and stamens clearly visible.
description_view_1: The open flower is viewed more frontally, showing the full spread of petals and both buds in the background.
description_view_2: The view highlights the two unopened buds and the back of the open flower, with more leaves visible at the base.
description_view_3: The side view emphasizes the length of the buds and the curvature of the petals, with the stem and leaves more apparent.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a whorled configuration, radiating symmetrically from the center of the flower. There is slight overlapping at the base, and the petals are broad and slightly recurved, typical of Lilium species.
